features: Super soft luxiorious plush popcorn covered hot water bottles provide a great cuddle companion for long winter nights.
The deluxe and soft feel mean they are ideal for bedtime or even use on the sofa.
Hot water bottle is made of natural rubber
description: Product description Super soft luxiorious plush popcorn covered hot water bottles provide a great cuddle companion for long winter nights. The deluxe and soft feel mean they are ideal for bedtime or even use on the sofa. The cover protects from the heat yet increases the soft and long lasting warmth from the hot water. Hot Water Bottles with Popcorn Plush Cover - Assorted Colours BrandCountry Club ManufacturerBeamfeature Model NoHWB202711 Barcode5023674202704 What we think you should know : Item : Hot Water Bottles with Plush Cover Design : Popcorn Soft, warm & luxurious Stylish & modern Instant comfortable heat Composition : Cover : 100% Polyester Hot water bottle is made of natural rubber Rubber conforming to BS1970 : 2012 Indications General aches and pains, relaxation, sleep aid Directions Fill the hot water bottle with hot water, heat it in a microwave or on a stove, and then use it to provide heat therapy on the affected body part (neck or back) for a comfortable and long-lasting warmth. Ensure the water is not too hot to prevent burns. Use for as long as desired for relaxation, sleep aid, or to relieve general aches and pains. Always follow safety guidelines when using hot water bottles. See more
